# Vendors

Owned by `marketing-procurement`. The vendor registry across all marketing-purchasing categories: agencies, production, event suppliers, media, technology, research.

`registry.md` is the canonical list. Per-vendor profiles can live at `<vendor-slug>/profile.md` when more detail is needed (commercial summary, performance log, primary contacts).

Status enum: `active`, `dormant`, `rfq-in-progress`, `off-boarded`, `blocked`.
